acceptanceReviewed.criterion: A local Linux CI or PR-readiness command includes `nix develop -c just direct-capture-preflight` before broader checks.
PR template and Linux/repo documentation identify the direct-capture preflight as part of Linux PR readiness.
Evidence records local `nix develop -c just direct-capture-preflight`, the updated local gate, and `nix develop -c just check`.
macOS validation remains native and is not made responsible for Linux/Nix direct-capture dependencies.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The docs and PR template keep macOS validation on `just macos-check`.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No runtime capture, product QUIC, portal, capture-to-NVENC, zero-copy, cross-device, decode, render, presentation, or latency claim is made.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This node aligns local command guidance only; live capture remains separate hardware evidence.
